requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety (220 V / 50 Hz — Type C / Type L Plug)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全（220V / 50Hz — C型/L型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全（220V / 50Hz — C型/L型插頭）

summary.en: Syria operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz electrical supply. Both Type C (Europlug — 2-pin round, 4.0 mm pins, compatible with Type E/F sockets) and Type L (Italian standard — 3-pin round, 4.0 mm pins in a line, also used in Libya and parts of the Middle East) plugs are in common use across Syria. Wireless devices with integrated mains power supplies (smart plugs, wireless access points, routers, cellular modems, etc.) must be electrically safe for 220 V / 50 Hz operation and must comply with SASMO electrical safety standards. SASMO references IEC electrical safety standards (such as IEC 62368-1 for audio/video and IT equipment safety, or equivalent) as national technical baselines. Products must be tested and certified to SASMO-recognised electrical safety standards. The Chinese CCC (GB 4943.1) electrical safety certification is not accepted as a substitute by SASMO. Arabic-language safety instructions are expected on the device or in accompanying documentation.
summary.zh: 叙利亚使用220V/50Hz电力供应。C型插头（欧式插头 — 双圆针，4.0mm针脚，兼容E/F型插座）和L型插头（意大利标准 — 三圆针直排，4.0mm针脚，也用于利比亚和中东部分地区）均在叙利亚广泛使用。带有内置市电电源的无线设备（智能插座、无线接入点、路由器、蜂窝调制解调器等）须在220V/50Hz条件下具有电气安全性，并须符合SASMO电气安全标准。SASMO参考IEC电气安全标准（如IEC 62368-1音视频和IT设备安全，或同等标准）作为国家技术基准。产品须按SASMO认可的电气安全标准进行测试和认证。中国CCC（GB 4943.1）电气安全认证不被SASMO接受为替代。设备或随附文件中须有阿拉伯语安全说明。
summary.zht: 敘利亞使用220V/50Hz電力供應。C型插頭（歐式插頭 — 雙圓針，4.0mm針腳，相容E/F型插座）和L型插頭（意大利標準 — 三圓針直排，4.0mm針腳，也用於利比亞和中東部分地區）均在敘利亞廣泛使用。帶有內置市電電源的無線設備（智慧插座、無線接入點、路由器、蜂窩調製解調器等）須在220V/50Hz條件下具有電氣安全性，並須符合SASMO電氣安全標準。SASMO參考IEC電氣安全標準（如IEC 62368-1音視頻和IT設備安全，或同等標準）作為國家技術基準。產品須按SASMO認可的電氣安全標準進行測試和認證。中國CCC（GB 4943.1）電氣安全認證不被SASMO接受為替代。設備或隨附文件中須有阿拉伯語安全說明。

standards_or_laws: SASMO electrical safety standards (Syrian Arab Organization for Standardization and Metrology)
IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety)
IEC 60950-1 (Information technology equipment — Safety, predecessor to IEC 62368-1)
IEC 60884-1 (Plugs and socket-outlets for household use — Type C / Type L)
Syrian Electricity Law and SASMO national standards

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for wireless devices is covered by CCC certification referencing GB 4943.1 (information technology equipment safety, based on IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1). China uses 220 V / 50 Hz (same voltage and frequency as Syria), but with Type A/I plug (Chinese standard GB2099.1 / AS/NZS 3112 variant) which differs from Syrian Type C/L. CCC safety test reports carry underlying IEC-based test data that may be useful as reference but are not accepted as direct substitutes by SASMO.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备的电气安全由参考GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，基于IEC 60950-1/IEC 62368-1）的CCC认证覆盖。中国使用220V/50Hz（与叙利亚相同的电压和频率），但使用A/I型插头（中国标准GB2099.1/AS/NZS 3112变体），与叙利亚C/L型不同。CCC安全测试报告包含基于IEC的测试数据，可作为参考，但不被SASMO接受为直接替代。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線設備的電氣安全由參考GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，基於IEC 60950-1/IEC 62368-1）的CCC認證覆蓋。中國使用220V/50Hz（與敘利亞相同的電壓和頻率），但使用A/I型插頭（中國標準GB2099.1/AS/NZS 3112變體），與敘利亞C/L型不同。CCC安全測試報告包含基於IEC的測試數據，可作為參考，但不被SASMO接受為直接替代。

standards_or_laws: CCC — GB 4943.1 (Information technology equipment safety — based on IEC 60950-1)

gap.en: Although China and Syria share the same 220 V / 50 Hz mains voltage and frequency, two gaps remain: (1) Plug type — Syrian installations use Type C and Type L plugs, not Chinese Type A/I; devices sold with a Chinese plug require an appropriate Type C or Type L plug or adapter for Syrian use. (2) Certification standard — CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1) is not accepted by SASMO; a SASMO-recognized electrical safety certificate (referencing IEC 62368-1 or equivalent) is required. Confirm current SASMO accepted certification schemes with a qualified Syrian regulatory agent.
gap.zh: 尽管中叙两国市电电压和频率相同（220V/50Hz），仍存在两处差距：(1) 插头类型 — 叙利亚安装使用C型和L型插头，而非中国A/I型；以中国插头销售的设备在叙利亚使用须配备适当的C型或L型插头或转接头。(2) 认证标准 — SASMO不接受CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1）；须取得SASMO认可的电气安全认证（参考IEC 62368-1或同等标准）。应向合格的叙利亚监管代理确认SASMO当前接受的认证方案。
gap.zht: 儘管中敘兩國市電電壓和頻率相同（220V/50Hz），仍存在兩處差距：(1) 插頭類型 — 敘利亞安裝使用C型和L型插頭，而非中國A/I型；以中國插頭銷售的設備在敘利亞使用須配備適當的C型或L型插頭或轉接頭。(2) 認證標準 — SASMO不接受CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1）；須取得SASMO認可的電氣安全認證（參考IEC 62368-1或同等標準）。應向合格的敘利亞監管代理確認SASMO當前接受的認證方案。

source.publisher: SASMO — Syrian Arab Organization for Standardization and Metrology (هيئة المواصفات والمقاييس السورية)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to SASMO-recognized standards (referencing IEC 62368-1 or equivalent) is mandatory for mains-powered wireless devices imported into Syria. Syrian installations use Type C and Type L plugs at 220 V / 50 Hz. Chinese CCC (GB 4943.1) certification is not accepted by SASMO. Confirm accepted certification schemes with a qualified Syrian regulatory agent. Arabic-language safety instructions are expected.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于进口至叙利亚的市电供电无线设备，符合SASMO认可标准（参考IEC 62368-1或同等标准）的电气安全合规为强制要求。叙利亚安装使用220V/50Hz的C型和L型插头。SASMO不接受中国CCC（GB 4943.1）认证。应向合格的叙利亚监管代理确认接受的认证方案。须有阿拉伯语安全说明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於進口至敘利亞的市電供電無線設備，符合SASMO認可標準（參考IEC 62368-1或同等標準）的電氣安全合規為強制要求。敘利亞安裝使用220V/50Hz的C型和L型插頭。SASMO不接受中國CCC（GB 4943.1）認證。應向合格的敘利亞監管代理確認接受的認證方案。須有阿拉伯語安全說明。
